compiled_state.title: [required-checks.txt]: ci-dso-staged.yml check contexts included that don't exist in this repo's CI
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review standard reviewer — important finding.
Finding: required-checks.txt lists check contexts from ci-dso-staged.yml (lint-format, tests, tests-pipefail-strict, llm-review, validate-ci) that are template job names for consuming projects, not this repo's CI workflows. If provision-ruleset.sh is applied to this repo's main branch, it would register non-existent required checks, permanently blocking all PRs.
File: .github/required-checks.txt
Category: correctness
Fix: Either (a) remove consuming-project entries from the file and add a separate template file for consuming projects, or (b) add prominent comments clearly marking the ci-dso-staged entries as 'for consuming projects only, not for this repo' and update provision-ruleset.sh to filter/scope accordingly.

comments.body: Investigation (debug-everything 2026-04-27): .github/required-checks.txt does not exist in the current branch HEAD (worktree-20260427-084003). The file and all associated scripts (provision-ruleset.sh, validate-required-checks.sh) are being developed on worktree-20260427-101014. Commit 9f51e3b3bd on that branch already has the correct version of required-checks.txt that explicitly excludes consuming-project ci-dso-staged.yml entries with a clear comment. No fix needed in this branch — will be resolved when worktree-20260427-101014 is merged.
comments.author: Test
